subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta et al, spoken on 1920-01-01
subcodes.first_line: The reality of spirit, because it is not corporeal, cannot be in bodily form. We cannot say it is like the fire, or like water.
subcodes.subjects: @immateriality; ineffability of soul; spirit, @mind as principle emanation; activity of the human spirit, @the mind's power of discovery, @intelligible vs. perceptible realities, @origin of the soul; the soul as emanation
